2229720.name: Tarmac Legends®
2229720.description:
3 years ago, Aaron Mitchell was put on the path of a personal vendetta, framed for an innocent person’s death while the killer got away; now it’s time to hunt them, from both sides of the law. With Agent Aya Nowak in your passenger seat, and your connections in the racing underworld, find the man who ruined your life and don't let anyone get in your way. Face off against many brutal characters, hired to take you down and cover up the truth. The path is twisted and winding, who knows what lead will get you closer to the man who started this mess?


Career mode is a classic, non-canon racing experience. Buy and customise hundreds of cars from everyday family cars to high-powered supercars, D class to S class, as a racer and a cop. Repaint your ride, add decals, change body kits (or police gear) and fit custom wheels. You can tune your car to your personal taste with engine, body, boost and suspension tuning. Race in 5 fully explorable open world locations, as well as a multitude of challenge series events consisting of different themes, giving you the chance to try and buy cars from all across the globe in all varieties.

The mini open world environments have multiple event types to complete as both a racer and a cop, and bosses to take down before you can move to more events. They also feature extra challenges such as stunt runs where you can find hidden packages and unlock additional premium cars.


  • Dual Progression Experience: The linear, story heavy "Campaign", and the traditional open-ended "Career".
  • Cops VS Racers Gameplay: Drive, battle and customise both racer and police vehicles. Racers have the edge on customisation, being able to choose from custom body kits, decals and wheels, but the cops have "Perks" - offensive power-ups they can access while racing such as bolts or spike strips to deal extra damage.
  • Car Collect-a-Thon!: Buy hundreds of vehicles in career, with attention to detail for every car. In Career, you will have event types limited to certain cars, so as you play you will build a diverse collection of rides.
